text.title: django-imports Procedure
text.summary: Five steps to produce a validated imports spec.

step.name: enumerate-apps
step.action: List every app. Detect existing cross-app imports without aliases (grep for `from apps.<a>.models import`).

step.name: set-policies
step.action: Set section_order, alias_convention, fk_reference_style, type_checking_policy. wildcard_allowed=false, multi_dot_relative_allowed=false are hard-coded.

step.name: declare-ruff-config
step.action: Set known_first_party=["apps"]; section_order matches policies; add a per-file ignore for apps/*/serializers.py forbidding `from __future__ import annotations` if DRF is in use.

step.name: declare-fk-strategy
step.action: Confirm fk_reference_style="string-for-cross-app" — all cross-app ForeignKey/M2M use string refs ("users.User"), in-app FKs may use class refs.
step.decision-gate: Reject any cross-app FK using class reference.
